ns1:History_List_Array.ns1:History_List: Event="17" Description="" SourcePath="" Comment="" CreateTime="2026-03-05 18:10:16" Creator="marci" HistoryId="{9F6C7284-B605-4ED1-B66B-15AA713E3174}" SourceId="" SourceShortId=""
Event="2" Description=" (Model_1)" SourcePath="" Comment="" CreateTime="2026-03-05 18:10:20" Creator="marci" HistoryId="{DD786608-0415-47BE-82E6-D8508CB42124}" SourceId="" SourceShortId=""

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: PARENT UPDATE RESTRICT
PARENT UPDATE CASCADE
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: /* erwin Builtin Trigger */ /* %Parent %VerbPhrase %Child on parent update cascade */ /* %ErwinRelationInfo */ IF /* %%ParentPK(" OR",UPDATE) */ %ParentPK(" OR",UPDATE) BEGIN IF @numrows = 1 BEGIN SELECT %JoinPKPK(@ins,inserted," = ",", ") FROM inserted UPDATE %Child SET /* %%JoinFKPK(%Child,@ins," = ",",") */ %JoinFKPK(%Child,@ins," = ",",") FROM %Child,inserted,deleted WHERE /* %%JoinFKPK(%Child,deleted," = "," AND") */ %JoinFKPK(%Child,deleted," = "," AND") END ELSE BEGIN SELECT @errno = 30006, @errmsg = 'Cannot cascade %Parent update because more than one row has been affected.' GOTO error END END

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: PARENT UPDATE SET NULL
PARENT DELETE RESTRICT
PARENT DELETE CASCADE
PARENT DELETE SET NULL
CHILD INSERT RESTRICT
CHILD INSERT CASCADE
CHILD INSERT SET NULL
CHILD UPDATE RESTRICT
CHILD UPDATE CASCADE
CHILD UPDATE SET NULL
CHILD DELETE RESTRICT
CHILD DELETE CASCADE
PARENT INSERT RESTRICT
UPDATE HEADER
UPDATE FOOTER
DELETE HEADER
DELETE FOOTER
INSERT HEADER
INSERT FOOTER
CUSTOM TRIGGER HEADER
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: CREATE %TLX(@if(IsPropertyTrue("Use_Alter_Syntax")) {"OR ALTER "})TRIGGER %ProcedureOwner(.)%TriggerName ON %TableOwner(.)%TableName %SQLServerWithOptions %Fire %Actions(",") %ProcedureProps AS

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: CUSTOM TRIGGER FOOTER
ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Template_Code: %DBMSDelim

ns1:Trigger_TemplateProps.ns1:Name: CUSTOM TRIGGER DEFAULT BODY
PARENT UPDATE SET DEFAULT
PARENT DELETE SET DEFAULT
PARENT INSERT SET DEFAULT
CHILD INSERT SET DEFAULT
CHILD UPDATE SET DEFAULT
CHILD DELETE SET DEFAULT
CHILD DELETE SET NULL
PARENT INSERT SET NULL
PARENT INSERT CASCADE
PARENT UPDATE NO ACTION
PARENT DELETE NO ACTION
PARENT INSERT NO ACTION
CHILD UPDATE NO ACTION
CHILD DELETE NO ACTION
CHILD INSERT NO ACTION
